audit_items.proof_trace: The linear decay formula `start - (start-end).mulDiv(elapsed, duration)` is correctly implemented: (1) parameter validation at L653-657 enforces `startingPriceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier`, preventing underflow; (2) L647-649 enforces `auctionDuration != 0`, preventing division-by-zero; (3) elapsed time is clamped to `auctionDuration` at L785 implementing `min(elapsed, duration)`; (4) `mulDiv` rounds down the subtracted term so `priceMultiplier >= end` holds always.
